set-up-your-brand-and-team-overview.png.note: Wide orientation shot for the 'Set Up Your Brand and Team' series hub. Settings > Brand > Profile with Lumon Fresh selected in the Single Brand Selector. Agent-captured 2026-07-17 at 1000x915 CSS viewport clip, 2x, dom-sanitize with freshenDates:false (no relative dates on page; avoids day-count copy rewrites). No cursor -- read-only orientation state. Superseded by -v2 (unselected 'Staging Test Brand' chip blemish).

set-up-your-brand-and-team-overview-v2.p.note: Reshoot 2026-07-17 to fix a seed-data blemish: the unselected 'Staging Test Brand' chip next to the Lumon Fresh selector was hidden via page.evaluate (display:none on the button) rather than renamed, to avoid an icon/label mismatch -- no fabricated brand or feature. Same route, viewport (1000x915 CSS, 2x), and dom-sanitize config (freshenDates:false) as the original. No cursor -- read-only orientation state.
